Website layer: Source of truth and access boundary
Build item: Confirm Drive, Sheets, prototype and production responsibilities before technical build starts.
Source surface: Website Access Review; Leadership Decision Capture LDC-015; Alpha-style benchmark brief
Validation required: Access model accepted; source-of-truth rule stated; no restricted data in public build.
Update target after accepted: Website Access Review; DEC-004; TASK-015; GATE-005
Non-publication boundary: Does not approve website access or broaden sharing without recorded authority.

Build item: Map public, protected, restricted and withheld areas into site navigation and sitemap.
Source surface: Website Content Review; Website Content Approval Templates
Validation required: Navigation shows access class for every area and excludes withheld/restricted material.
Update target after accepted: Website Content Review; Website Access Review; GATE-006
Non-publication boundary: Does not publish a sitemap or public navigation until access decisions are accepted.

Build item: Freeze approved original copy, content scope, media use and no-copy Alpha boundaries.
Source surface: Website Content Review; Alpha-style benchmark brief; Copyright Boundary Review Packet
Validation required: All public/protected copy has approved source, owner and permission status.
Update target after accepted: Website Content Review; Human Review HR-007; GATE-006
Non-publication boundary: Does not copy Alpha wording, assets, screenshots, media or branded materials.

Build item: Build Journey overview, purpose, audience, pathway and next-step pages from approved original content.
Source surface: Website Content Review; START HERE; Canonical Resources
Validation required: Approved page copy and public-safe content scope are linked before build.
Non-publication boundary: Does not make private operating content public.

Build item: Embed or link only approved explanation videos with permissions, captions and replacement plan.
Source surface: Website Content Review; Copyright Boundary Review Packet
Validation required: Video permission, caption/accessibility check and fallback content are recorded.
Update target after accepted: Website Content Review; Human Review HR-007; GATE-006
Non-publication boundary: Does not embed third-party videos or Alpha media without permission.

Build item: Create schedule/date surface using approved event data and publish-state labels.
Source surface: Event Readiness; Website Content Review
Validation required: Dates are approved, current, owned and safe for intended audience.
Update target after accepted: Event Readiness; Website Content Review; TASK-016
Non-publication boundary: Does not expose unapproved dates or private planning details.

Build item: Build leader-only resource navigation for templates, packets, canonical docs and review materials.
Source surface: Resource Library Index; Website Access Review
Validation required: Leader-only access rules, document links and withheld materials are checked.
Update target after accepted: Resource Library Index; Website Access Review; GATE-005
Non-publication boundary: Does not broaden Drive sharing or reveal restricted resources.

Build item: Expose approved planning templates, agenda packs, sign-off templates and delegation tools.
Source surface: templates/operations; templates/communications; Website Content Review
Validation required: Each template has approved access class, owner and source-of-truth link.
Update target after accepted: Website Content Review; Resource Library Index; TASK-016
Non-publication boundary: Does not treat templates as completed approvals.

Build item: Design editable delegation and role-assignment surface fed by approved Leader Roster fields only.
Source surface: Leader Roster; Owner Appointment Routing; Leadership Decision Capture
Validation required: Only approved names, roles, backups and authority evidence are surfaced.
Non-publication boundary: Does not invent leaders or copy source-derived names into public/prototype files.

Build item: Surface launch gates, task status, decisions and readiness metrics without exposing restricted details.
Source surface: Dashboard; Launch Gates; Gate Evidence Checklist
Validation required: Metrics are source-linked, non-sensitive and consistent with live tracker formulas.
Non-publication boundary: Does not hide open gates or imply readiness from prototype metrics.

Build item: Route qualified reviewers to packet links and decision templates using approved access controls.
Source surface: Human Review Routing; Human Review Sign-off Templates
Validation required: Reviewer routing respects qualifications, privacy and evidence-link rules.
Update target after accepted: Human Review Routing; Human Review; GATE-002
Non-publication boundary: Does not assign reviewers or approve HR rows.

Build item: Create non-sensitive pilot summary area after debrief evidence and accepted changes exist.
Source surface: Pilot Cycle Plan; Pilot Evidence Capture Templates; Leadership Review Outputs
Validation required: Pilot outcome summary contains no private participant, medical or financial data.
Update target after accepted: Pilot Log; Leadership Review Outputs; GATE-003
Non-publication boundary: Does not claim pilot completion without real debrief evidence.

Build item: Confirm no restricted data is stored in public/prototype files and design least-privilege links only.
Source surface: Restricted Data Placement Approval Templates; Data Replacement and Access Cleanup folder
Validation required: Restricted data remains in least-privilege Drive or Sheets locations only.
Non-publication boundary: Does not migrate or expose personal, medical, financial or private data.

Build item: Implement authentication, role groups and protected areas only after access model approval.
Source surface: Website Access Review; Website Access Model Decision Templates
Validation required: Role groups match approved access model and are tested before publication review.
Non-publication boundary: Does not activate authenticated tools before access approval.

Build item: Define what forms are allowed, where submissions go and which fields are prohibited from public surfaces.
Source surface: Restricted Data Replacement Checklist; Website Access Review
Validation required: Allowed fields, storage location, retention and access group are approved.
Non-publication boundary: Does not collect restricted data through public forms.

Build item: Define build checks for links, mobile layout, accessibility, privacy copy, source links and external dependencies.
Source surface: site prototype tests; Publication Gate Checklist
Validation required: Automated and manual QA checklist is complete before publication review.
Non-publication boundary: Does not certify production readiness until approved scope is implemented and tested.

Build item: Set rollback owner, backups, version evidence, content owner and support path before launch.
Source surface: Production Website Publication Approval Templates; Leadership Decision Capture LDC-017
Validation required: Rollback owner, backup artifact and support route are recorded.
Non-publication boundary: Does not publish without rollback and operating owner evidence.

Build item: Prepare deployment checklist and environment variables after approved content and access scope exists.
Source surface: Publication Gate Checklist; operating hub prototype
Validation required: Environment, deployment steps and approval evidence are documented.
Non-publication boundary: Does not deploy, publish or broaden sharing from backlog preparation alone.

Build item: Assemble approved version, production URL, validation evidence, rollback plan and go/no-go record.
Source surface: Production Website Publication Approval Templates; Leadership Decision Capture LDC-017
Validation required: Publication package includes signed decision, approved scope and validation evidence.
Non-publication boundary: Does not treat assembled evidence as final approval.

Build item: Create change log, maintenance cadence, owner review and content update pathway after publication approval.
Source surface: START HERE; Resource Library Index; Leadership Review Outputs
Validation required: Post-launch owner, review cadence and change log are approved.
Non-publication boundary: Does not begin public operations before publication authority approves launch.
